title: Accessibility, Security, and Code Quality Report Branding
description: Org-specific copy for test suite reports. Downstream forks override this file with their own copy; the report templates read from it at generation time. Strings only — no logic.

$schema.description: Pointer to this schema for editor validation

org_name.description: Full organization or project name shown in titles and credits

org_short_name.description: Short org name for compact contexts (tab titles, breadcrumbs)

support_url.description: Where contributors go for help with the project

report_title_prefix.description: Prefix prepended to report titles (e.g. '<project name> — Linting Report')

report_intro_paragraph.description: Brief introductory paragraph shown at the top of reports explaining scope and audience

report_footer_credit.description: Single-line credit shown in the report footer
